items.definition_en: A large table for meetings and discussions.
items.example_en: Everyone gathered around the conference table for the team meeting.

items.definition_en: A list of topics to be discussed during a meeting.
items.example_en: The project manager shared the meeting agenda before we started.

items.definition_en: A comfortable chair used in meeting rooms.
items.example_en: The staff replaced the old seats with new conference chairs.

items.definition_en: A message asking someone to attend a meeting.
items.example_en: She sent out the meeting invitation via email.

items.definition_en: Equipment used for long-distance meetings by phone or video.
items.example_en: Their teleconference system allows teams to connect from anywhere.

items.definition_en: A wall that divides a large room into smaller spaces.
items.example_en: We closed the partition wall to make two smaller meeting spaces.

items.definition_en: A device that displays video or images on a screen.
items.example_en: The presentation was shown with a video projector.

items.definition_en: A set of speakers and microphones for clear audio.
items.example_en: The sound system made it easy to hear everyone in the meeting.

items.definition_en: A small room for group discussions during meetings.
items.example_en: Each team worked in a separate breakout room.

items.definition_en: A card worn to identify participants at a meeting or event.
items.example_en: She wore her conference badge with her name on it.

items.definition_en: A tool or app that helps plan meetings.
items.example_en: We used a meeting scheduler to find a suitable time.

items.definition_en: A screen for showing slides or videos in a meeting room.
items.example_en: The presentation screen was set up at the front.

items.definition_en: A support used to hold a microphone in place.
items.example_en: He adjusted the microphone stand before starting the talk.

items.definition_en: A small shelf for holding markers near a board.
items.example_en: Put the markers back on the marker tray after use.

items.definition_en: A device or tray for keeping notepads organized.
items.example_en: Each seat had a notepad holder on the table.

items.definition_en: A small device that shines a colored spot for pointing.
items.example_en: The speaker used a laser pointer during the slideshow.

items.definition_en: A large surface for displaying projected images.
items.example_en: The room has a pull-down projector screen.

items.definition_en: A machine that provides cold or hot water.
items.example_en: There is a water dispenser at the back of the meeting space.

items.definition_en: A section made of glass to separate spaces or let in light.
items.example_en: The glass panel lets natural light into the meeting area.

items.definition_en: A chair provided for visitors in a meeting space.
items.example_en: She brought in extra guest chairs for the clients.
